data.body: DOCS-INDEX gate caught: docs/land-contract.md (S4) unindexed in docs/README.md -> #590 Verified -1. Fixed: added README index entry, rebuilt #590 (amend, Change-Id preserved) + re-applied #591 via cherry-pick; tree diff vs backup = ONLY the 3-line README add. Re-pushed. #588(S2c-fix) fully GREEN. STATE: all epic CODE + DOCS built & in review (#588 S2c-fix, #589 S3, #590 S4, #591 S6). Remaining = S5 (4 deploy tasks): authorable artifacts (Dockerfile/compose/terraform/scripts/status-endpoint/crash-recovery) buildable now; container deploy + terraform apply (SSM) + live E2E need AWS auth (ESCALATE) + prod Gerrit host. Starting S5 authorable artifacts; will escalate for AWS at the apply/deploy step.
